MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-08-2006 IN 206 WAS HEARD TODAY. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT AND NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT MIZEE SZETO'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF RIGHT TO JURY TRIAL WAS GRANTED. CASE IS TO BE REINSTATED AS JURY TRIAL. JURY FEES SHALL BE POSTED BY 4 PM ON 3/8/06. TRIAL DATE OF 3/27/06 REMAINS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERK: D LOK/LESPY/JIROQUE; REPORTER:HELEN SOREP-MATLEY CSR 	225 (206)

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-27-2006 - CASE SETTLED AS PER LETTER FROM PLTF'S ATTY, COLOMBATTO, KLIMENKO & ROSSE & PHONE CALL FROM PETNR'S LAW FIRM, ZACKS, UTRECHT & LEADBETTER. PLTF'S ATTY REQUESTED CASE BE SET ON CRC225 DISMISSAL CALENDAR AS PER 30 DAY AGREEMENT WITH DEFT TO COMPLETE PAYMENTS. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON MAY-16-2006 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 225.
CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-16-2006 AT 10:00AM PURSUANT TO CRC 225. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
